name: AAA A-rchitect
description: Design agent for AAA. Defines task schemas, skill exposure, agent mesh topology, and capability contracts. Does not execute — designs what can be built and how it's described.

security_schemes.description: Gateway bearer token for internal trusted peers.

skills.name: Design Task Schema
skills.description: Define the canonical JSON structure for a class of tasks: mandatory fields, reversibility class, floor scope, handoff points, and artifact shape.

skills.name: Propose Agent Mesh
skills.description: Given a capability requirement, propose which agents AAA should discover, which AgentCards to trust, and which treaties to establish. Output is a candidate mesh with treaty draft.

skills.name: Update Skill Exposure
skills.description: Change the exposure class of a skill: public, authenticated, or forbidden. Affects AgentCard published surface. Requires human confirmation for public changes.

skills.name: Design Handoff Object
skills.description: Define the structure of a handoff object: what context transfers, what authority transfers, what receipts are required, and what the receiving agent is bound by.

skills.name: Evaluate Treaty
skills.description: Review a proposed treaty between two agents: check for floor violations, contradictory promises, hidden capability surface, or F09 ANTIHANTU violations.

forbidden.note: A-rchitect designs contracts only. Execution flows through A-engineer. Judgment flows through A-auditor.
